article_meta.title: PlanetOur Almost-Apocalyptic Climate FutureBy shooting for 3 degrees Celsius of warming, the world could slide toward a

reasoning: Solid identification of multiple clear bias instances in the author's prose with no attribution violations. One mislabeled item and a few notable omissions prevent a top score.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged passages are in the author’s voice; no quoted or attributed text was flagged.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Most flagged items are genuine bias patterns; the cost-comparison claim is debatable but still a fair unsubstantiated assertion.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed several clear author-level biases, e.g., the sensationalist headline ('Almost-Apocalyptic'), 'ham-fisted metaphor,' 'ritual in frustration and futility,' and 'frankly in denial.'
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Labels generally fit, except the grid-cost claim is better categorized as Unsubstantiated Claims/Omission of Source Attribution rather than Opinion Presented as Fact.
